use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in web interfaces
Toolbars and control panels with multiple button variants
ai_summary: A versatile React Aria-based button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe prop-based styling, featuring accessible focus-visible states and hover transitions. A foundational UI building block suitable for any SaaS or web application interface.
